Good progress ‚Äî 2 pass, 2 fail. The remaining issue is in `findSessionBySdkId` ‚Äî it returns `session.sessionId` (raw SDK ID) instead of `session.semanticSessionId` (the actual filename). This causes ENOENT when the returned value is used as a file path. Let me trace the root cause:

In `initSession`, when `sdkSessionId` is provided:
- `sessionId = sdkSessionId` (raw) ‚Äî stored in JSON
- `filename = semanticName_sdkSessionId` ‚Äî the actual file name
- `findSessionBySdkId` returns `session.sessionId` (raw) ‚Äî WRONG, should return `session.semanticSessionId` (filename)
